global.description: The ad features a vibrant purple background with a clear call to action and engaging text.
global.main_message: Promoting a binge-watching service with a flexible cancellation policy.

elements.label: Purple gradient background
elements.description: A smooth purple gradient fills the background, creating a vibrant and engaging atmosphere.

elements.label: NeonCast logo
elements.description: The logo features bold, modern typography in white against the purple background, positioned prominently at the top.

elements.label: Abstract shapes
elements.description: A combination of geometric shapes, including a circle and a square, rendered in a lighter shade of purple, adds visual interest.

elements.label: Small circle
elements.description: A small, light purple circle is placed near the center, serving as a decorative element.

elements.label: Main message text
elements.description: The text 'Binge starts now Cancel anytime' is displayed in bold, white font, centrally located for emphasis.

elements.label: UGC label
elements.description: The text 'UGC' appears in a small, white font at the top left corner, indicating user-generated content.

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A rounded button at the bottom reads 'Get offer' in bold, white text, inviting user interaction.

elements.label: Additional text
elements.description: The text 'UGC' is small and positioned at the top left, possibly indicating a feature or category.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, interstitial, modern and vibrant, key elements include a logo, main message, and call to action.
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top, the main message is centered, and the call to action is at the bottom.
